heroSubtitle: From Narmer's unification of the Two Lands (~3100 BCE) to Sisi's Egypt — tracing pharaonic dynasties, Islamic caliphates, Napoleon's expedition, the 1952 revolution, the Arab Spring, and modern statecraft across the world's most enduring civilization.
footerNote: Data sourced from Egyptian official records, UNESCO, academic Egyptology research (Shaw, Lehner, Hawass), major international outlets, IMF, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses.
